evidence_strength: Scaffold only. The post-level explanatory pipeline has not been run on attributed production data yet.
directional_findings: Platform, content theme, CTA style, and posting window should be tested together against attributed 7-day donation revenue.
Without post-level attribution, any content advice should be treated as directional rather than causal.

recommendations.title: Instrument every post
recommendations.detail: Store platform, content theme, CTA type, scheduled time, actual publish time, and a tracked donation link for every post so the pipeline can compare post characteristics to real donation outcomes.

recommendations.title: Use a fixed attribution window
recommendations.detail: Measure donation count and revenue in a consistent 7-day follow-up window after each post to keep comparisons fair across platforms and campaigns.

recommendations.title: Separate evidence from instinct
recommendations.detail: Keep broad campaign/channel analysis separate from post-level content analysis so the chatbot can clearly distinguish validated findings from hypotheses.

data_gaps: No post-level attributed revenue dataset has been supplied to the analysis yet.
The current donation tables summarize channels and campaigns, but do not yet identify which individual post drove a donation.
